title: Decimillipede Segment
move_pattern: Cycles through Constrict → Bulk → Writhe in sequence, then repeats. Starting move determined by segment index. When segment is defeated, enters Reattach move if ReattachPower is active, then randomly selects from Writhe, Bulk, or Constrict.
notes: This is a segment of the Decimillipede boss. Segments fight alongside each other. When a segment dies, it can reattach via ReattachPower if the power's uses remain. Each segment's max HP is adjusted to be unique (even number, non-matching teammates) to prevent health pool stacking. The AnimSegmentsAttack animation triggers visual effects on all active segments simultaneously.
